title: Andrei Fortuna
text: Home * People * Andrei Fortuna Andrei Fortuna [1] Andrei Fortuna , a Romanian software developer and freelancer , who has worked on a widerange of projects, such as chess engine programming, 3d engines, Web search engine , e-mail software , online auction sites [2] . Andrei is author the WinBoard programs Chess176 [3] and the open source chess engine Freyr . In 2001, Andrei developed the CCC Web search engine of the pre 2006 forum software [4] . Contents 1 Forum Posts 2 External Links 3 References Forum Posts [ edit ] New Winboard Program by Đorđe Vidanović , Winboard Forum , February 15, 2000 A New Release of my Amateur Chess Engine Freyr by Andrei Fortuna , CCC , February 22, 2000 A Question on simple Alpha-Beta versus PVS/Negascout by Andrei Fortuna , CCC , March 21, 2000 » Alpha-Beta , Principal Variation Search , NegaScout CCC Search Engine is available ! by Andrei Fortuna , CCC , November 15, 2001 Crafty (under winboard) question by Andrei Fortuna , CCC , December 21, 2003 » Standard Algebraic Notation (SAN) , WinBoard External Links [ edit ] About Andrei Fortuna ( Wayback Machine ) References [ edit ] ↑ Planet Source Code™ | Freyr - A Chess Playing Program , image archived ↑ About Andrei Fortuna ( Wayback Machine ) ↑ Re: The very first Romanian chess engine - Chess 176/1 by Jim Ablett , CCC , June 24, 2011 ↑ Thanks a million to Andrei Fortuna!!! by Steven Schwartz , CCC , November 15, 2001 Up one level
